caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a green baseball cap sits in a room filled with framed photos on the walls and clothing on racks. His t-shirt features the text "NEVER DO SIT" in white lettering. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone on a boom arm. To his left, a logo that reads "THE STREETS TALK" is visible, and on the right, red text says "STREETS TALK TOT". In the background, a decorative black tufted chair sits against a wall of photos, and a white mannequin wearing a white garment is partially visible. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, slightly tilting his head and shifting his gaze downward as he speaks, while the camera remains stationary.
